boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot ALLOW. AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. STD-ZEN-080-P requires enrollment authority for consent version before enrollment activation. Site Z-12, protocol P7.2, and activation date 2026-06-28 are matched but enrollment authority is MISSING.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 states 'consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending'.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The single remaining defect is consent C11 enrollment authority, which AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms is pending. No other source in current packet addresses this gap. External resolution required before action boundary can close.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing matched (2026-06-28), scope matched (site Z-12, protocol P7.2), but enrollment authority dependency for consent C11 is not satisfied per AUTH-ZEN-080 and STD-ZEN-080-P.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source document IDs only from current packet
Action boundary correctly identified as trial-site activation query
AUTH-ZEN-080 pending status preserved as controlling fact

final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms site Z-12 activation under protocol P7.2 on 2026-06-28, but explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. Policy STD-ZEN-080-P requires enrollment authority for consent version before enrollment activation. No source in the current packet grants this authority. The action boundary remains open pending external resolution via superseding AUTH or explicit enrollment authority statement.
open_blockers: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current packet addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.
